title: Corporate Secretary
summary: The Corporate Secretary keeps Neuroartan’s governance records clear, complete, and ready for formal review.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role protects board process, minutes, resolutions, registers, formal records, and the traceability of company decisions.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Keep Neuroartan’s formal records accurate, organized, and auditable as the company grows.
